case_title: GORDON THRUPP et al RESPONDENT VS. LENA CHANG C/O GREAT CHINA INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT LENA CHANG C/O GREAT CHINA INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL AS TO RESPONDENT THRUPP, GORDON THRUPP, MARGARET HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINUTES FOR MAY-22-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2003 - JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFFS/RESPONDENTS GORDON THRUPP AND MARGARET THRUPP AND AGAINST DEFENDANT APPELLANT LENA CHANG IN THE AMOUNT OF $695.00 FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT REFUND AND INTEREST, COSTS IN THE SUM OF $52.00, AND ATTORNEYS FEES IN THE SUM OF $150.00. JUDGE: PRO TEM JUDGE SUSAN LEW; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE. (D-525, THURS. 5/22/03) SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT DOCUMENT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2003 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY 22, 2003 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SUSAN LEW. TRIAL DE NOVO HELD 5/22/03 IN D-525; APPELLANT LENA CHANG APPEARED THROUGH COUNSEL ANDERS M. THORSON AND RESPONDENT APPEARED THROUGH COUNSEL MATTHEW B. WEBER. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM SUSAN LEW; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE (D-525 5/22/2003)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT THRUPP, GORDON THRUPP, MARGARET RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LENA CHANG C/O GREAT CHINA INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL $695.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $897.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
